I am the Elder of Silverfall. The wilds are restless. Bring me a token of safe passage and I will mark you a friend of this moon.
You have walked the wilds and lived. Welcome, friend of Silver.
Mind the road. The drow elders summon all friends of the moon to council in Silverfall.
Smallrest welcomes you. The road from Silverfall has not been kind lately.

Steve the Light-Fingered, at your service. I rode with Sunny for a season. I'll tell you what I know — for a price.
Bring me a token from any moon city's elder. Then we'll talk about Sunny.
Good. Listen. Sunny was no fool — but she was bored, and that's worse. We met her in Semos. She wore that grey cloak even in summer.
Cara of the Open Hand, at your service. I rode with Sunny for a season. I'll tell you what I know — for a price.
Bring me a token from any moon city's elder. Then we'll talk about Sunny.
Good. Listen. Sunny was no fool — but she was bored, and that's worse. We met her in Semos. She wore that grey cloak even in summer.
Sam the Sober, at your service. I rode with Sunny for a season. I'll tell you what I know — for a price.
Bring me a token from any moon city's elder. Then we'll talk about Sunny.
Good. Listen. Sunny was no fool — but she was bored, and that's worse. We met her in Semos. She wore that grey cloak even in summer.
Every rumor of every region passes through this board. Pick a region and I will tell you what we have heard.

replies.text: Tell me of the Alpine Reach.
Tell me of the River Country.
Tell me of the Ocean Shore.
Tell me of the Stream Country.
Tell me of the Sun Coast.
Tell me of the Dry Lake.
Tell me of the Castle Region.

message: the Grasslands: a small task is open here that Sunny did not do. Take it on if you wish.

Princess Jasia! Praise the King — the wind itself sent you. Your sister Sunny is gone. The King and Queen hide it from the court but the castle weeps. Please, search for her. Begin in the throne room — your parents will tell you the rest.

replies.text: I will not stop until I find her.

message: Daughter. Your sister is gone. She spoke last with the prison guard — that is where you must begin. Take whatever you need from the armory. Bring her home.
Sunny was bored. The court bores all of you, I know. She asked endless questions of every guard. When she vanished, only one guard would not meet our eyes.
Jasia, my dove. I felt it the moment she stepped past the gate. Find her. Tell her I am not angry.
Princess. Yes, Sunny spoke to me. I told her of the witch in the forest — but only after she promised to set me up with the head cook. Bring me her word and I'll tell you exactly where Sunny went.
Truly? Then on my honor: Morwenna's hut sits north of the forest path, by the bent oak. Sunny rode out at dawn the next morning.
Princess Jasia. The kitchen is yours. ... Hesker? The young guard? Tell him yes — but tell him I expect flowers.
Sunny? Yes — bright girl, sharper than her smile. I taught her once. But first she had to fetch back my wand from the city's thieves. Bring it back yourself, and I'll tell you where she went.
Well done. Sunny rode out with three friends — Steve, Cara, Sam. Find them. They went everywhere. They will know where she is now.
The princess herself. Looking for a wand? Sunny took it from us, fair and square — but we keep one of our own. Search the chest behind me if you dare.
Quiet, princess. The boss is in.
Princess. Yes — Sunny passed through here with three friends. There was an incident with a stolen cloak. Old Tarwyn at the well saw the whole thing.
Bru, finest goods on the mountain. The Princess Sunny? She bought a flask of oil from me before disappearing into the caves. Strange days.
I saw it all. Steve tried to take the cloak. She put it on and was gone — gone into the caves north of town. The drow cave. None come back from there. None but the drow.
Surface child. You smell like Sunny did. State your need quickly — I have lost patience with surface tales.

replies.text: I seek a healer for my sister.
I am hunting a drow killer.

message: Heh. Same story. Pass — but don't speak to anyone until you reach Lloth. She decides who lives.
Sunny was here. She was kind to me — rare in a surfacer. I gave her a returning ring. I will give you one too. Use it well. She went to the dragons next, in the volcano.
Ringbearer? I see no ring. Speak to me again only when you wear the Tent Ring — and not before.
By the moons — the ring is back. Enter, Ringbearer. Sunny waits with the elders.
I am the Bronze Dragonlord. Sunny did me a kindness once. Do me one in turn — clear my chamber of the wild young drakes — and I will name you a friend.
Well met. The chamber is quiet. Take this scale-shard with my mark.
I am the Copper Dragonlord. Sunny did me a kindness once. Do me one in turn — clear my chamber of the wild young drakes — and I will name you a friend.

Well met. The chamber is quiet. Take this scale-shard with my mark.
We were camped in the forest when she made this place. We have been here ever since. Speak to all the moon elders — they will know where she is now.
Ish, lakekeeper. The lake is small but deep. Sunny stocked it herself. Catch a fish if you have time — but the elders will not wait.
Welcome to the rocket pad, Ringbearer. Seven moons. Seven elders. Each moon launches its own rocket and only the elder of each moon may invite you to the council.
